value.body:
## Context

Agent task endpoints can create, list, read, cancel, retry, and stream task events, but users need a product surface that explains what agents are doing.

## Outcome

A dashboard shows queued, running, waiting, failed, canceled, and completed agent tasks across repositories and tickets.

## Acceptance criteria

- Dashboard lists active and recent tasks with repository, ticket, provider, workflow, status, age, and latest event.
- Users can filter by repository, ticket, provider, and status.
- Task detail links back to the related ticket and run artifacts.
- Empty and failure states explain missing providers, disabled providers, or backend failures.
- API query behavior and renderer mapping are covered by tests.

frontmatter.title: Build an agent task queue and run dashboard

value.title: Build an agent task queue and run dashboard
